title: Set of 3 - Shake & Fresh Carpet Freshener Powder 500g – Calming Lavender & Eucalyptus, Eliminates Odours, Freshens Carpets, Contains Essential Oils – Easy to Use, Sprinkle & Vacuum
features: 𝐆𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭 𝐕𝐚𝐥𝐮𝐞 𝐒𝐞𝐭 𝐨𝐟 𝟑 (𝟓𝟎𝟎𝐠 𝐄𝐚𝐜𝐡) – Includes Three 500g Tubs of Pan Aroma Shake & Fresh Carpet Freshener Powder, Giving You a Long-Lasting Supply That’s Ideal for Regular Use in Busy Households, Ensuring Your Home Always Smells Clean, Fresh, and Welcoming.

𝐄𝐥𝐢𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐬 𝐓𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡 𝐎𝐝𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬 – Specially Formulated Carpet Freshener Powder Designed to Neutralise and Eliminate Unwanted Household Smells, Including Pet Odours, Cooking Smells, Tobacco Smoke, Dampness, and Everyday Mustiness, Leaving Your Carpets Smelling Clean and Fresh.

𝐂𝐚𝐥𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐋𝐚𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫 & 𝐄𝐮𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐲𝐩𝐭𝐮𝐬 𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐭 – Infused with Natural Essential Oils for a Long-Lasting Fragrance That Not Only Freshens Carpets but Also Creates a Relaxing, Soothing Home Atmosphere with the Calming Notes of Lavender and the Refreshing Touch of Eucalyptus.

𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐲-𝐭𝐨-𝐔𝐬𝐞 𝐒𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐤𝐥𝐞 & 𝐕𝐚𝐜𝐮𝐮𝐦 𝐅𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐮𝐥𝐚 – Simply Shake the Powder Evenly Across Your Carpet, Allow It to Settle for a Few Minutes, and Then Vacuum to Instantly Revitalise Carpets, Rugs, and Upholstery, Leaving Them Fresher and More Inviting.

𝐌𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐢-𝐏𝐮𝐫𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐅𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐡𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐬 – Suitable for Use on Carpets, Rugs, Fabric Mats, and Upholstery Throughout the Home, Helping to Banish Trapped Odours, Refresh Fibres, and Maintain a Cleaner, More Welcoming Living Environment.
description: Product description Bring Lasting Freshness to Your Home with Shake & Fresh Carpet Freshener Powder. Specially Formulated to Eliminate Stubborn Odours and Revive Your Carpets, Rugs, and Upholstery, This Easy-To-Use Powder Is the Perfect Way to Keep Your Home Smelling Clean and Welcoming Every Day. Infused with the Calming Fragrance of Lavender and Eucalyptus, This Carpet Freshener Doesn’t Just Mask Smells – It Helps to Neutralise Odours at the Source. Whether It’s Pet Smells, Cooking Aromas, Tobacco, or General Household Odours, Shake & Fresh Leaves Your Carpets Refreshed with a Soothing, Long-Lasting Scent. Using the Powder Is Quick and Simple – Just Sprinkle Evenly Over Your Carpet, Leave for a Few Minutes, and Vacuum Away. the Fibres Are Instantly Revived, and Your Living Spaces Are Left Feeling Fresher and More Inviting. Ingredients Fragrance (Lavender & Eucalyptus scent)
